title: thelypteris illicita
intro: Thelypteris illicita, also known as the "Cinnamon fern," is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris illicita include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, Thelypteris illicita is often used in infusions or decoctions, and its rhizome is also used in traditional medicine to prepare various remedies.
